Wallet TUI ▣ renders inline · enter to open]8;;elizaos-tui-ready api=http://127.0.0.1:43517 elizaOS terminal tui · Wallet TUI]8;; tab/↑↓ focus · enter activates · esc/q closes]8;; ]8;; EVIDENCE WALLET BODY]8;; EVIDENCE WIDTH 96]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; chat (ctrl+l to type)]8;; ctrl+l focuses the view · esc/q closes]8;; ]8;; EVIDENCE WALLET BODY]8;; EVIDENCE WIDTH 96]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; chat]8;; No terminal chat sent yet.]8;; enter sends · ctrl+l focuses the view]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; hello from evidence pty ]8;;elizaOS terminal tui · Wallet TUI]8;; ctrl+l focuses the view · esc/q closes]8;; ]8;; EVIDENCE WALLET BODY]8;; EVIDENCE WIDTH 72]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; chat]8;; No terminal chat sent yet.]8;; enter sends · ctrl+l focuses the view]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; hello from evidence pty ]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; you: hello from evidence pty]8;; enter sends · ctrl+l focuses the view]8;; ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────]8;; ]8;; sent: hello from evidence pty]8;;
